examples.title: Dynamic Memory Allocation - Single Object
examples.description: Demonstrates basic new and delete for single object
examples.explanation: Shows how to allocate and deallocate a single object using new and delete. Constructor is called with new, destructor with delete.

examples.title: Dynamic Array Allocation
examples.description: Shows proper allocation and deallocation of dynamic arrays
examples.explanation: Demonstrates dynamic array allocation using new[]. Note the use of delete[] (not delete) to properly free array memory and call destructors for each element.

examples.title: Smart Pointers Example
examples.description: Demonstrates automatic memory management with smart pointers
examples.explanation: Demonstrates smart pointers: unique_ptr for exclusive ownership (only one can own) and shared_ptr with reference counting for shared ownership. Both automatically deallocate memory when no longer needed.

examples.title: 2D Dynamic Array with Proper Memory Management
examples.description: Shows allocation and deallocation of 2D dynamic arrays
examples.explanation: Shows proper 2D dynamic array allocation: first allocate row pointers, then allocate columns for each row. Deallocation must be in reverse order - delete each row array first, then delete the array of pointers.
